captures.chat_api_url: https://api.gamma.app/graphql (primary AI generation transport, POST). Supporting AI telemetry: POST https://api.gamma.app/ai/v2/track-span. Generation draft route: /create/generate/{draftId} (is7suu64d4m0qs3)
captures.response_content_type: application/json (GraphQL); AI outline/content streamed (Gamma streams generation progress; SSE/chunked-over-fetch for token stream within the GraphQL/AI pipeline)
captures.success_response_wire_sample: GraphQL response envelope: {"data":{"<operation>":{...generated cards/outline...}},"errors":null}. AI generation produced presentation OUTLINE (윤곽선) of 10 cards: title 'テスト 발표: 성공적인 시작을 위한 여정' + sectioned bullet lists. NOTE: raw GraphQL/AI body taint-guarded (not captured); endpoint+method confirmed live via read_network_requests (POST api.gamma.app/graphql 200 + ai/v2/track-span 201). This is a DOCUMENT-GENERATION flow, not a conversational chat — benign prompt produced a slide outline, not a one-sentence reply. Full deck build (생성 button) NOT triggered to avoid credit spend + heavy render. CDP/HAR needed for exact GraphQL bytes.
captures.frame_separator: GraphQL single JSON response (HTTP). Generation progress streamed via chunked fetch within AI pipeline.

dom_render_structure.bottom_bar: [data-testid="sticky-bottom-bar"] with 생성(generate) CTA + 크레딧 320개 + 총 카드 10개; [data-testid="theme-name"]; [data-testid="butterbar"]

captures.framework: Next.js (#__next + __NEXT_DATA__ present) + Chakra UI (chakra-ui-light class). Apollo/GraphQL client to api.gamma.app.

screenshot_name: ss_10009e7bf (in-tool capture; not saved to disk)
notes: etap-bypassed clean baseline. Logged-in (장희 최's Workspace, Free tier, 320 credits). KEY STRUCTURAL FACT: Gamma is NOT a chat service — it is an AI presentation/document generator. The benign prompt was entered into the AI '생성' flow and produced a 10-card presentation OUTLINE (윤곽선), not a one-sentence greeting. Transport = GraphQL (POST api.gamma.app/graphql) + ai/v2/track-span, distinct from the SSE/WS chat services in this batch. Did NOT click final 생성 to avoid credit consumption. Next.js + Chakra UI; ProseMirror-style outline editor with rich data-testid card controls. No console errors.
